# Human-in-the-loop review

## Human authority areas

AI cannot be final authority on:

```text
truthfulness of claims
brand positioning
ethical boundaries
legal/policy risk
user-specific niche nuance
whether a comment is good-faith criticism
whether proof is representative
```

## Review steps

```text
1. AI scores asset.
2. Human checks claims/proof/trust.
3. AI suggests experiment setup.
4. Human approves or rejects.
5. Metrics decide after publication.
```

## Final rule

```text
AI can accelerate decisions.
It cannot remove accountability.
```
